zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton於1327年出生在英國諾圖波藍德希頓時，他的父親Sir William Swinburne43歲，母親Alice de Vaux40歲。他於1352年與Joan de Ogle在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1363年之前在英國諾圖波藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton于1327年出生在英国諾圖波藍德希頓时，他的父亲Sir William Swinburne43岁，母亲Alice de Vaux40岁。他于1352年与Joan de Ogle在英国諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1363年之前在英国諾圖波藍德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Swinburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham): habitational name primarily from Great and Little Swinburne (Northumberland), but perhaps also occasionally from one or other places similarly named, from Old English swīn ‘pig’ + burna ‘stream’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton was born in 1327, in Heaton, Northumberland, England, his father, Sir William Swinburne, was 43 and his mother, Alice de Vaux, was 40. He married Joan de Ogle in 1352, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 1363, in Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton est né en 1327, à Heaton, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Swinburne, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Alice de Vaux, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Ogle en 1352, à Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 1363, à Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton 1327 in Heaton, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Swinburne 43 und seine Mutter Alice de Vaux 40. Er hat 1352 in Northumberland, England Joan de Ogle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 1363 in Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton è nato il nel 1327 nel Heaton, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Sir William Swinburne, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Vaux, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Ogle nel 1352, nel Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1363, nel Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Swinburne of Capheatonが1327年にイギリスノースウンバーランドヒートンで生まれた時，父Sir William Swinburneは43歳，母Alice de Vauxは40歳であった。1352年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでJoan de Ogleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1363年以前にイギリスノースウンバーランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton(이)가 1327년 영국 노르스벌랜드 히턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Swinburne(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Vaux(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1352년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Joan de Ogle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1363년 이전 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton nasceu em 1327, em Heaton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Swinburne, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Vaux, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Ogle em 1352, em Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1363, em Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Swinburne of Capheaton родился в 1327 г. в местности хитон, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Swinburne было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Vaux, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Ogle в 1352 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 1363 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия.
